## Description
Brief summary of what this PR changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing deployments to change behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Version bump (NUT or base image)

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Testing
- [ ] Built Docker image locally and verified startup logs
- [ ] Tested with actual UPS hardware (if applicable)
- [ ] Verified no breaking changes to existing configurations
- [ ] Updated documentation and CHANGELOG

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have updated README.md with breaking changes
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md with version/date
- [ ] I have tested this on TrueNAS or equivalent environment

## Notes
Any additional context or known limitations.
